name: P:GTA.Math.Vector2.Item(System.Int32)
summary: Gets or sets the component at the specified index.
returns: The value of the component at the specified index.
value: The value of the X or Y component, depending on the index.

params.name: index
params.description: The index of the component to access. Use 0 for the X component and 1 for the Y component.
